touches.ai_summary: Initial outbound email to Riley Tanaka introducing our CRM automation platform. Highlighted pain points around manual sales processes and mentioned competitive advantages over legacy solutions. Riley responded with interest in learning more about automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What specific automation workflows does your platform support for sales teams?
questions_asked.answer: Our platform automates deal tracking, email sequencing, task assignment, and pipeline forecasting. The unlimited automation tier includes custom workflow builders.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call to discuss PrismAgency's current CRM setup

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sharing case study of similar SaaS company that reduced manual CRM work by 60%. Riley replied asking about integration capabilities with their existing tech stack.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce and our current email tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration and connect with all major email platforms including Gmail and Outlook.

next_steps: Send technical integration documentation

touches.ai_summary: Shared integration docs and pricing overview for mid-market segment. Riley responded positively and mentioned they're currently evaluating a few vendors including Clari.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation approach differ from Clari's forecasting focus?
questions_asked.answer: We focus on end-to-end workflow automation across the entire sales process, while Clari specializes primarily in revenue forecasting. Our platform includes forecasting but extends to automating repetitive tasks.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with broader sales team

touches.ai_summary: Email proposing discovery call agenda covering current pain points, team size, and automation priorities. Riley confirmed availability and mentioned wanting to include Dylan Flores (CRO) in evaluation phase.
next_steps: Book discovery call for next week
Prepare demo environment for PrismAgency use case

touches.ai_summary: Confirmation email for upcoming discovery call. Sent pre-call questionnaire about current CRM challenges and team structure. Riley filled it out indicating 24 active sales users and frustration with manual data entry.

questions_asked.question: Can your system handle automated activity logging from emails and calls?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. Our AI automatically captures and logs all customer interactions without manual rep input.

next_steps: Review questionnaire responses before discovery call

touches.ai_summary: Pre-discovery email sharing agenda and confirming Dylan Flores will join the technical evaluation phase. Riley appreciated the structured approach and confirmed current pain points around forecast accuracy and rep productivity.
next_steps: Conduct discovery call tomorrow

touches.ai_summary: 52-minute technical evaluation call with Riley walking through PrismAgency's current CRM setup and automation needs. Discussed 24-seat deployment, unlimited automation tier requirements, and specific workflows around deal tracking and email sequences. Riley expressed strong interest but mentioned Clari is also in consideration for their forecasting needs.

questions_asked.question: How does your forecasting accuracy compare to Clari's AI models?
questions_asked.answer: Our forecasting uses similar ML approaches but integrates directly with automation workflows, so predictions improve as reps use automated processes. Clari focuses purely on forecast intelligence.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: For 24 seats with unlimited automation, we typically complete implementation in 4-6 weeks including data migration and custom workflow setup.

questions_asked.question: What are your biggest pain points with your current CRM process?
questions_asked.answer: Manual data entry is killing productivity, and our forecast accuracy is inconsistent because reps aren't updating deals consistently.

objections: We're concerned about implementation complexity and change management with the sales team
next_steps: Send implementation plan and change management resources
Schedule follow-up to address Clari comparison

touches.ai_summary: 17-minute follow-up call to address implementation concerns raised in technical eval. Walked through our 4-phase onboarding approach and shared customer success stories from similar-sized sales teams. Riley seemed reassured but wanted to see more detailed ROI projections.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide ROI data specific to sales automation for SaaS companies?
questions_asked.answer: Our SaaS customers typically see 40-50% reduction in manual CRM work and 15-20% improvement in forecast accuracy within first quarter.

questions_asked.question: Have you identified internal champions beyond yourself to drive adoption?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, Dylan (CRO) is supportive and will be exec sponsor. We also have buy-in from our account managers who are most impacted by current inefficiencies.

next_steps: Prepare custom ROI analysis for PrismAgency
Schedule product demo

touches.ai_summary: Email sharing custom ROI analysis showing projected $180K annual savings from automation efficiency and improved forecast accuracy. Also included competitive comparison document addressing Clari positioning. Riley thanked us and scheduled product demo.

questions_asked.question: Does your pricing include ongoing training and support?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, unlimited automation tier includes dedicated CSM, quarterly training sessions, and 24/7 technical support.

next_steps: Conduct product demo next week

touches.ai_summary: 37-minute product demo (originally scheduled for 45min but rescheduled once). Demonstrated core automation workflows, custom builder, and forecasting dashboard. Riley brought Nora Perez (Account Manager) and Chris Jung (Account Manager) to see end-user experience. Team was impressed with automation capabilities but had questions about pricing flexibility.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing for annual contracts?
questions_asked.answer: We offer volume discounts for annual commitments and can discuss custom packaging based on your specific needs.

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the automation workflows without developer resources?
questions_asked.answer: Our workflow builder is fully no-code. Your sales ops team can create and modify automations without technical support.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a must-have versus a nice-to-have for your team?
questions_asked.answer: If we can prove it will meaningfully improve forecast accuracy and reduce admin burden, it becomes must-have. We need our reps selling, not updating CRM fields.

objections: Pricing seems high compared to some alternatives we're evaluating
next_steps: Prepare formal proposal with pricing options
Schedule proposal review with Dylan Flores

touches.ai_summary: Email delivering formal proposal for 24 seats on unlimited automation tier at $20,600 ACV. Included three pricing scenarios and implementation timeline. Riley acknowledged receipt and said she needs to review with Dylan before next steps.
next_steps: Wait for internal review
Follow up in 3 days if no response

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in on proposal review. Riley replied that Dylan has reviewed and they want to discuss pricing flexibility given they're comparing against Clari's offer. She asked if we could schedule a call to negotiate terms.

questions_asked.question: What's your best pricing for annual commitment?
questions_asked.answer: Let's schedule a call to discuss options. We have flexibility for the right partnership.

next_steps: Schedule proposal review call

touches.ai_summary: 11-minute proposal review call with Riley. Discussed proposal details and confirmed budget alignment. Riley mentioned Clari came in lower on pricing and asked if we could match or get closer. Agreed to bring updated pricing options.

questions_asked.question: Can you meet Clari's pricing while maintaining the unlimited automation tier?
questions_asked.answer: I need to check with leadership but we're motivated to earn your business. Let me see what I can do.

questions_asked.question: Beyond pricing, what would make us the clear choice over Clari?
questions_asked.answer: Your automation capabilities are stronger for our use case. Clari is more forecast-focused but we need broader workflow automation.

next_steps: Present revised pricing to leadership
Schedule exec meeting with Dylan Flores

touches.ai_summary: Email confirming exec meeting scheduled with Dylan Flores to discuss strategic fit and pricing. Riley appreciated the responsiveness and confirmed Dylan is ready to move forward if pricing works out.
next_steps: Prepare for exec meeting with Dylan

touches.ai_summary: 29-minute exec meeting with Dylan Flores (CRO). Discussed strategic value of automation for PrismAgency's growth plans and competitive positioning. Dylan confirmed budget exists and timeline is Q2 implementation. He asked directly about our best pricing and emphasized need to see strong ROI justification versus Clari alternative.

questions_asked.question: What discount can you offer for annual contract with 24 seats?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer a competitive discount for annual commitment. Let me work up options and get back to you this week.

questions_asked.question: How confident are you in the ROI projections you shared?
questions_asked.answer: Very confident. They're based on actual customer data from similar SaaS sales teams. We can guarantee improvement metrics in the contract.

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline and process from here?
questions_asked.answer: We need final pricing by end of week. Riley and I will review, then loop in Nora for procurement if we're aligned.

next_steps: Deliver final pricing proposal by Friday
Include performance guarantees in contract terms

touches.ai_summary: 17-minute negotiation call with Riley to present final pricing with 23% discount to meet budget constraints and stay competitive with Clari. Riley appreciated the movement and said it's within their approval range but needs Dylan's final sign-off.

questions_asked.question: Is this your absolute best pricing for the unlimited automation tier?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this is as far as we can go while maintaining full feature access and dedicated support.

questions_asked.question: What concerns, if any, does Dylan still have?
questions_asked.answer: He wants to make sure we're making the right strategic choice. The discount helps but he wants one more conversation to confirm value prop versus Clari.

next_steps: Schedule final exec alignment call with Dylan
Prepare contract with agreed pricing

touches.ai_summary: 19-minute exec meeting with Dylan to finalize decision. Reviewed competitive advantages over Clari, confirmed ROI projections, and discussed implementation support. Dylan confirmed he's comfortable with the investment at negotiated price and ready to move forward pending legal review.

questions_asked.question: What does your implementation support look like for the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: You'll have dedicated implementation manager, weekly check-ins, custom workflow setup assistance, and on-demand training for your team.

questions_asked.question: Are there any remaining concerns before we move to contract?
questions_asked.answer: No major concerns. I'm confident this is the right platform. Let's get Nora involved for procurement and legal review.

next_steps: Send contract to Nora Perez for procurement review
Schedule kickoff call for post-signature

touches.ai_summary: 38-minute negotiation call with Riley and Nora Perez to finalize contract terms. Reviewed payment terms, implementation timeline, performance guarantees, and data security requirements. Nora had questions about contract length and auto-renewal terms but was satisfied with our flexibility. Contract sent for legal signatures.

questions_asked.question: Can we negotiate the auto-renewal clause to require explicit approval?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can modify to require 60-day written notice for renewal rather than automatic renewal.

questions_asked.question: What are the payment terms for annual contract?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is annual upfront, but we can do quarterly payments with small processing fee if that helps with cash flow.

questions_asked.question: What's the timeline for legal review and signature?
questions_asked.answer: Our legal team can turn this around in 3-5 business days. Targeting signature by end of next week.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we need to add seats mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: Seats can be added anytime at pro-rated pricing for remainder of contract term.

objections: We need more flexibility on contract terms around cancellation and renewals
next_steps: Await legal review and signatures
Prepare implementation kickoff materials
